programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Matt Shea sets out on the trail of wanted criminals evading justice in an attempt to reveal the shocking scale of this country's hidden fugitive crisis. His journey leads him from safehouses in London to an underground network in Thailand, as he uncovers a shocking new mentality among criminals, where justice is optional. What does this mean for victims of crime and for confidence in the criminal justice system?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Costumier Scott usually hides behind the drag queen Casta Hex, but tonight he's shedding his alter ego as he sits down with George, who may strut in like a catwalk star, but hasn't dated in five years. Former Olympian Simon and 60-year-old stable manager Louise are both seeking love later in life, while disco queen Priscilla and bhangra-loving accountant Raj both want fun, but can their musical tastes mix? Twenty-three-year-old Jack is feeling nervous about his blind date and hopes he can find some common ground with Rachella

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets another bunch of challenges for the celebrities, as a result of which Joanna Page does something startling with a pineapple, Armando Iannucci does something confusing with a nursery rhyme and Amy Gledhill does something unexpected with balls of ice. As if that wasn't enough, Kumail Nanjiani reveals his missing body part. Greg Davies dishes out the points

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a year's worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Swallows Rest in Weymouth, Dorset, where hosts Jane and Keith Smith are pulling out all the stops to win. However, the colour combinations in the rooms do not go down well with rival B&B owner Ray Chowdhury, and an afternoon of drawing starts some competition between Ray and newlyweds James and Darren Kosa-Jones

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Burley Inn in the New Forest, where newlyweds Darren and James welcome their guests. Donna and David prove to have a critical eye when they discover holes in the sheets, and Jane and Keith have a disagreement over a toilet roll. In the afternoon, the couple reveal their quizmaster skills, before Ray grills them on how they run their B&B over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Hotel Montville in Redditch, Worcestershire for the third day of the competition, where first impressions of Ray Chowdhury's unique style and decor are positive. However, room inspections leave Jane and Keith Smith threatening not to stay, and the guests grill their host about his business background at dinner. Although some light relief is given in the form of ice sculpting, breakfast disappoints James and Darren Kosa-Jones, and Ray must face the harsh reality of his guests' opinions at feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to Donna and David's Silverton B&B in Shrewsbury, where the complimentary earplugs soon have Darren and James worrying about the noise from the road outside. A Segway race helps whip up the guests' competitive spirit, Donna gets emotional when her work-life balance is questioned, and chef David proves he can handle the unexpected at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner announced. Swallows Rest is first up and hosts Jane and Keith want to find out about Ray's colour preferences. Next Darren and James of the Burley Inn quiz Ray over his fussiness around their pine furniture. When it comes to the Silverton, B&B team Donna and David take umbrage with Jane and Keith's comments

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a gnarly chicken pie

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Durham compete to host the best dinner party, beginning with Steph and James, who offer a night of gastropub favourites. Day two sees animal-lovers Gary and Amanda serve up two courses of fish on their homely-menu, and hosts Andy and Emma feel confident on the final night of the competition

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie tries to expand her social life by going out with her work colleagues, so Doug resorts to crude tactics to scare them off. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny use Arthur as a means of attracting women

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Danny comes down with lockjaw and Doug fritters away money on his credit card. Meanwhile, Arthur takes on front-desk duties at the senior centre, where he comes into conflict with the pudding seller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur tries to persuade Doug to be his partner in the senior centre's shuffleboard tournament - but doesn't bargain on him being hopeless at the game. Meanwhile, Carrie pretends to be ill in an effort to get Holly to cook for her

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Holly is evicted from her flat, so Arthur offers to let her move into the basement - and Doug soon realises the benefits of having another woman around. With Kevin James, Jerry Stiller and Nicole Sullivan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert and Amy finally get married in the Barone family tradition. Brad Garrett and Monica Horan star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra complains she and Ray do not have any fun together - and persuades him to let her join him in his game of golf. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie tries to gain the upper hand in her relationship with new daughter-in-law Amy, but Debra is determined the latest Barone wife will not endure the kind of interference she has had to put up with

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Samantha ends her relationship with Frasier on their return from a seemingly perfect weekend away, leaving him desperate to find out where he went wrong. However, Niles helps him realise that he only liked his new woman for her famous friends. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A story about the holiday season is told from the perspectives of Daphne, Niles, Martin and Roz as the Crane family prepares for Christmas. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: A British theme pub becomes Frasier's favourite new haunt - much to the annoyance of Daphne, who is already a regular and dislikes having to share the place with her boss. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart falls in love with the Reverend Lovejoy's daughter Jessica, but she spoils his dreams of romance by stealing the church collection plate and standing by as he takes the blame. Featuring the guest voice of Meryl Streep

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes up ice hockey and proves so good at the game that she completely transforms her ailing team's fortunes. Dismayed at being outshone by a girl, Bart tries to compensate by becoming a teacher's pet - only to be beaten up by bullies

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family visits a theme park based on Bart and Lisa's favourite TV cartoon The Itchy & Scratchy Show - but Homer is arrested, the kids are mischievous and the mechanised attractions go berserk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: $pringfield (Or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Legalised Gambling)
programme.desc: Mr Burns decides to open a casino in Springfield, and it is not before long Marge is bitten by the gambling bug - much to the dismay of her family. Animated comedy, with the guest voices of Gerry Cooney and Robert Goulet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to community-owned B&B The Gun at Ridsdale. A visit to a birds of prey centre results in one guest's feathery hat getting some special attention

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals go glamping at the Marthrown of Mabie site tucked away in a forest in Dumfries, where hosts Mike and Pam hope their guests will embrace the off-grid experience. Unfortunately, Louise and Kerry quickly find the loos to be bog standard, and get buzzed off by some uninvited guests in their accommodation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals are in the village of Holmrook in Cumbria, where Jo and Craig host at their Dale View B&B. The scenery is spectacular, but Kerry and Louise can't dust off their cleanliness concerns. After an afternoon aboard a steam train touring the Cumbrian hills, the guests bond over a few drinks. But Jo is left kicking herself after a poached egg disaster the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to the Cross Inn in Heptonstall, West Yorkshire. Eccentric hosts Gig and Lyndsey hope to impress with their 'one-of-a-kind' style. The B&Bers take it easy with a canal boat tour of the nearby waterways, before they're served gin by a giant sloth at Gig's gig venue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day arrives, and with some sore feelings festering, the B&Bers are ready to dish out the dirt on their competitors. Louise and Kerry want to know why Jo and Craig didn't like their B&B. Jo and Craig want to know why Louise and Kerry didn't like their B&B

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In Denmark, George meets a young couple tackling the enormous task of turning a derelict water pumping station into a luxury holiday home. Meanwhile, a dedicated outdoor swimmer builds himself a futurist micro camper. George and Will come up with a novel way to pick the colours for their elegant sky cabin, Will Hardie visits a glamping pod built in an upturned boat, and George visits one up a tree in a Danish forest

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In south London, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for a flat for first-time buyers Adam and Nicole, and a townhouse for world-record-holding rower Kat. Adam and Nicole live with their respective parents and need help to get them living together under the same roof but their home patch has become a pricey part of town, so they've saved for their entire adult lives to get a large enough deposit. They're nervous about spending all that hard-saved cash, but Kirstie manages to find them some hard-to-resist homes. In 2019 Kat was diagnosed with cancer. After going through chemotherapy and being told she was in remission she wanted a new focus, so she joined an all-female trio for an Atlantic rowing challenge. They beat the previous world record by more than seven days, and Kat's next challenge is to put down roots with a townhouse in her beloved south London. Even with a budget of over a million pounds, Phil finds it tough to hit everything on her wishlist in the top spots where she wants to live but once they manage to focus her search on Greenwich, things start to fall into place. A house with potential tugs at Kat's heart

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with Paul and Vic in the Yorkshire village of Clifford to see if they decided to sell their home or renovate it. Back in 2018, Kirstie and Phil visited to see if they could help the couple make a decision, providing them with a plan to renovate with their budget of £42,000 and showing them a number of other houses that would work well for them

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: Staff and volunteers go to extremes to make a success of the railway's steam gala, transporting a 60-tonne locomotive more than 300 miles from the Isle of Wight to Yorkshire. Plus, a historic tram and a vintage steam crane are put into action

programme.title: Shergar: The Racehorse and the IRA
programme.desc: Investigation into the theft of the world's most valuable racehorse in 1983, and its place in the turbulent backdrop of the Troubles in Northern Ireland, when the IRA may have sought funds through ransom demands. Featuring first-hand accounts and compelling historical context to uncover the shocking collision of politics, crime and sport

programme.title: Wrath of Man (2021)
programme.desc: A newly employed security guard gets off to a rocky start with his colleagues, but when he uses exceptional marksmanship skills to foil a robbery, they are left wondering what his background really is. While they fear he may be an inside man for a criminal gang, his mission of revenge slowly comes to light. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Holt McCallany and Andy Garcia

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Costumier Scott usually hides behind the drag queen Casta Hex, but tonight he's shedding his alter ego as he sits down with George, who may strut in like a catwalk star, but hasn't dated in five years. Former Olympian Simon and 60-year-old stable manager Louise are both seeking love later in life, while disco queen Priscilla and bhangra-loving accountant Raj both want fun, but can their musical tastes mix? Twenty-three-year-old Jack is feeling nervous about his blind date and hopes he can find some common ground with Rachella

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Comedy starring Sam Campbell. A hotshot director scours the country for everyday people with feature film ideas before racing against the clock to turn the idea into reality in just three days. Sam and his elite team set about bringing Mick Hall's incomprehensible concept - featuring a detective and real snakes - to the big screen. But it turns out that some people don't make good actors, and snakes have a tendency to bite

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: The residents of Smiling Spring Care Home want to make a sci-fi epic about a group of retirees who go inside a computer to defeat online scammers. But the shoot goes sideways when Pat makes moves on a wealthy resident, Winnie gets challenged to a fight and Jess discovers that she's truly terrible with old people

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: The story of a man whose partner convinced him she had terminal cancer, and that she had a miscarriage. Devastated by the news, he doubled down on supporting her and goes to work renovating the home of her friend. What he discovers at that house unravels the many layers of deception that she has been weaving

programme.title: Second Act (2018)
programme.desc: A lack of a college degree costs a woman with an abundance of street smarts a promotion in her job despite her success. Her godson responds by creating a fake profile for her that details a Harvard education and world travel, but there is a big surprise in store for her in her new role at a corporate firm. Romantic comedy, starring Jennifer Lopez, Milo Ventimiglia and Vanessa Hudgens

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples battle it out to host the best dinner party in Newcastle. Partners Fiona and Hannah kick things off with their Moroccan-themed menu. Couple David and Sonia, and childhood sweethearts Claire and Steven, all agree the puppet show was unexpected. Day two sees Steven and Claire's German-inspired menu. Finally, David decides a charm offensive is needed for his and Sonia's night

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: James and Jodie are pushing to get one room habitable in their dilapidated old farmhouse, while Dave learns how to keep sheep that are going to be shown in competition

programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier helps Carla overcome her terror of flying, while Rebecca anxiously awaits a visit from a restaurant critic. Bar-room comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: The Sam in the Grey Flannel Suit
programme.desc: Rebecca is astounded to learn Sam has been promoted to an administrative position in the company that owns Cheers - until she realises they only want him to play on the corporate softball team. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody decides he deserves a pay rise, but is fobbed off with a new, important-sounding job title. Comedy, starring Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Robert asks if he can borrow the suitcase sitting on the stairway landing, Ray explains he and Debra have been locked in a two-week battle of wills over who is responsible for putting the item away. Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie shame Ray into giving Robert a second bachelor party to make up for his disappointing first attempt

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A story about the holiday season is told from the perspectives of Daphne, Niles, Martin and Roz as the Crane family prepares for Christmas. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: A British theme pub becomes Frasier's favourite new haunt - much to the annoyance of Daphne, who is already a regular and dislikes having to share the place with her boss. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart falls in love with the Reverend Lovejoy's daughter Jessica, but she spoils his dreams of romance by stealing the church collection plate and standing by as he takes the blame. Featuring the guest voice of Meryl Streep

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes up ice hockey and proves so good at the game that she completely transforms her ailing team's fortunes. Dismayed at being outshone by a girl, Bart tries to compensate by becoming a teacher's pet - only to be beaten up by bullies

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family visits a theme park based on Bart and Lisa's favourite TV cartoon The Itchy & Scratchy Show - but Homer is arrested, the kids are mischievous and the mechanised attractions go berserk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: $pringfield (Or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Legalised Gambling)
programme.desc: Mr Burns decides to open a casino in Springfield, and it is not before long Marge is bitten by the gambling bug - much to the dismay of her family. Animated comedy, with the guest voices of Gerry Cooney and Robert Goulet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to community-owned B&B The Gun at Ridsdale. A visit to a birds of prey centre results in one guest's feathery hat getting some special attention

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals go glamping at the Marthrown of Mabie site tucked away in a forest in Dumfries, where hosts Mike and Pam hope their guests will embrace the off-grid experience. Unfortunately, Louise and Kerry quickly find the loos to be bog standard, and get buzzed off by some uninvited guests in their accommodation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals are in the village of Holmrook in Cumbria, where Jo and Craig host at their Dale View B&B. The scenery is spectacular, but Kerry and Louise can't dust off their cleanliness concerns. After an afternoon aboard a steam train touring the Cumbrian hills, the guests bond over a few drinks. But Jo is left kicking herself after a poached egg disaster the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to the Cross Inn in Heptonstall, West Yorkshire. Eccentric hosts Gig and Lyndsey hope to impress with their 'one-of-a-kind' style. The B&Bers take it easy with a canal boat tour of the nearby waterways, before they're served gin by a giant sloth at Gig's gig venue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day arrives, and with some sore feelings festering, the B&Bers are ready to dish out the dirt on their competitors. Louise and Kerry want to know why Jo and Craig didn't like their B&B. Jo and Craig want to know why Louise and Kerry didn't like their B&B

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In Denmark, George meets a young couple tackling the enormous task of turning a derelict water pumping station into a luxury holiday home. Meanwhile, a dedicated outdoor swimmer builds himself a futurist micro camper. George and Will come up with a novel way to pick the colours for their elegant sky cabin, Will Hardie visits a glamping pod built in an upturned boat, and George visits one up a tree in a Danish forest

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In south London, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for a flat for first-time buyers Adam and Nicole, and a townhouse for world-record-holding rower Kat. Adam and Nicole live with their respective parents and need help to get them living together under the same roof but their home patch has become a pricey part of town, so they've saved for their entire adult lives to get a large enough deposit. They're nervous about spending all that hard-saved cash, but Kirstie manages to find them some hard-to-resist homes. In 2019 Kat was diagnosed with cancer. After going through chemotherapy and being told she was in remission she wanted a new focus, so she joined an all-female trio for an Atlantic rowing challenge. They beat the previous world record by more than seven days, and Kat's next challenge is to put down roots with a townhouse in her beloved south London. Even with a budget of over a million pounds, Phil finds it tough to hit everything on her wishlist in the top spots where she wants to live but once they manage to focus her search on Greenwich, things start to fall into place. A house with potential tugs at Kat's heart

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with Paul and Vic in the Yorkshire village of Clifford to see if they decided to sell their home or renovate it. Back in 2018, Kirstie and Phil visited to see if they could help the couple make a decision, providing them with a plan to renovate with their budget of £42,000 and showing them a number of other houses that would work well for them

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: Staff and volunteers go to extremes to make a success of the railway's steam gala, transporting a 60-tonne locomotive more than 300 miles from the Isle of Wight to Yorkshire. Plus, a historic tram and a vintage steam crane are put into action

programme.title: Shergar: The Racehorse and the IRA
programme.desc: Investigation into the theft of the world's most valuable racehorse in 1983, and its place in the turbulent backdrop of the Troubles in Northern Ireland, when the IRA may have sought funds through ransom demands. Featuring first-hand accounts and compelling historical context to uncover the shocking collision of politics, crime and sport

programme.title: Wrath of Man (2021)
programme.desc: A newly employed security guard gets off to a rocky start with his colleagues, but when he uses exceptional marksmanship skills to foil a robbery, they are left wondering what his background really is. While they fear he may be an inside man for a criminal gang, his mission of revenge slowly comes to light. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Holt McCallany and Andy Garcia

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Lion (2016)
programme.desc: A five-year-old Indian boy is adopted by an Australian couple after getting lost hundreds of kilometers from home. 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family. Drama based on the biographical book A Long Way Home by Saroo Brierley, starring Dev Patel, Nicole Kidman and Rooney Mara

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Comedy starring Sam Campbell. A hotshot director scours the country for everyday people with feature film ideas before racing against the clock to turn the idea into reality in just three days. Sam and his elite team set about bringing Mick Hall's incomprehensible concept - featuring a detective and real snakes - to the big screen. But it turns out that some people don't make good actors, and snakes have a tendency to bite

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: The residents of Smiling Spring Care Home want to make a sci-fi epic about a group of retirees who go inside a computer to defeat online scammers. programme.desc: Ally has to interview her oldest living relative as part of a school project on genealogy, so Ray helps her track down Frank's long-lost Aunt Sarina, who lives in Italy but turns up on the Barones' doorstep

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray grows tired of Debra's cooking and asks Marie to teach her how to make his favourite dish - spaghetti and meatballs - leading to chaos in the kitchen. Starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.desc: Ray runs into trouble while trying to show Debra he can take over the running of the family finances, and resorts to a series of elaborate lies to get himself out of the mess he has created. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes on patrol with his policeman brother Robert and ends up foiling a robbery at a local restaurant by pelting the would-be thief with pizza. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.desc: Ray enlists his mother's help to reassure Ally, who is afraid to sleep in her own room because she is convinced it becomes the haunt of monsters once the lights go out. Ray Romano stars

programme.desc: Phoebe receives shocking news about her past, while Rachel is envious of Ross's uninhibited girlfriend. Monica mourns her previous relationships, prompting Chandler to offer his services as a boyfriend. Joey nags the pals to play a game involving removing items of clothing

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel realises she wants to start dating Ross again and writes him an 18-page letter expressing her feelings - but he falls asleep while reading it. Phoebe and her estranged birth mother discover they have a lot in common, and Monica is stung by a jellyfish

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica goes on a date with her high-school heart-throb. Ross begins playing tricks on Rachel, and Phoebe convinces herself a stray cat is the reincarnation of her long-dead mother. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler finds himself in hot water while dating Rachel's pushy boss. Joey decides to buy an encyclopaedia, but discovers he can only afford one volume, and Monica resolves to prove her mother wrong. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.sub-title: The One with the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel are threatened with eviction by the caretaker of their building, so Joey offers to help him practise ballroom dancing in exchange for letting them stay. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matt LeBlanc

programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's New Girlfriend

programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Crosses the Line
programme.desc: Chandler is racked with guilt for kissing Joey's girlfriend and embarks on a wild spending spree in a misguided effort to keep his pal from discovering the truth. Meanwhile, Phoebe proves to be the only one who appreciates Ross's dubious keyboard talents

programme.sub-title: The One with Chandler in a Box

programme.sub-title: The One Where They're Going to Party!

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's half-brother makes a startling announcement and asks a great favour of her, while Joey attempts to break down social barriers when he takes a job as a tour guide at Ross's museum. Chandler fears not living up to Kathy's expectations

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns the result of her pregnancy test and the friends' competitive spirit gets the better of them in a battle of the sexes arising from an apparently simple challenge. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel schemes to get a handsome client to ask her out on a date, while Chandler's girlfriend is driven away by his jealousy. Guest starring Tate Donovan

programme.sub-title: The One with All the Jealousy

They then head off for a bike ride - but what Barney forgets to mention to his dad is that they are riding on a tightrope 25 metres in the air

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The father and son duo's road trip takes them to Nicaragua, where they meet some colourful characters in the local market, and get a taste of the national sport when they join a professional baseball team. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica goes on a date with her high-school heart-throb. Ross begins playing tricks on Rachel, and Phoebe convinces herself a stray cat is the reincarnation of her long-dead mother. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler finds himself in hot water while dating Rachel's pushy boss. Joey decides to buy an encyclopaedia, but discovers he can only afford one volume, and Monica resolves to prove her mother wrong. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel are threatened with eviction by the caretaker of their building, so Joey offers to help him practise ballroom dancing in exchange for letting them stay. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Joey thinks Chandler hates his latest date, but could not be further from the truth. Rachel discovers her new boyfriend is a thief, while Phoebe desperately tries to catch a cold to regain her husky singing voice

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Chandler gets on more intimate terms with Joey's girlfriend, and Ross's love life improves - until his latest conquest reveals a grubby secret. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Crosses the Line
programme.desc: Chandler is racked with guilt for kissing Joey's girlfriend and embarks on a wild spending spree in a misguided effort to keep his pal from discovering the truth. Meanwhile, Phoebe proves to be the only one who appreciates Ross's dubious keyboard talents

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Chandler in a Box
programme.desc: Chandler agrees to spend Thanksgiving in a packing crate as penance for kissing Kathy, and the friends decide to give each other seasonal gifts. Monica visits Richard's son, who finds her every bit as attractive as his father did. Comedy, guest starring Michael Vartan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They're Going to Party!
programme.desc: Things start looking up for the gang as Monica gets a career opportunity that is too good to turn down and Rachel is offered a promotion. Meanwhile, Ross and Chandler are excited to hear an old friend is coming to visit. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Girl from Poughkeepsie
programme.desc: Ross embarks on a long-distance relationship, Chandler sets Rachel up with one of his colleagues, and Phoebe composes a seasonal song for her friends. Monica has trouble asserting her authority at work and hires Joey so she can fire him in front of the staff

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's half-brother makes a startling announcement and asks a great favour of her, while Joey attempts to break down social barriers when he takes a job as a tour guide at Ross's museum. Chandler fears not living up to Kathy's expectations

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns the result of her pregnancy test and the friends' competitive spirit gets the better of them in a battle of the sexes arising from an apparently simple challenge. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel schemes to get a handsome client to ask her out on a date, while Chandler's girlfriend is driven away by his jealousy. Guest starring Tate Donovan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's Dirty Day
programme.desc: Chandler visits a strip club and Rachel comes to regret asking Ross for a favour. Meanwhile, Charlton Heston discovers his co-star Joey in a compromising position on the first day of filming

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Rugby
programme.desc: Ross makes the mistake of agreeing to a game of rugby with Emily's tough English friends. Meanwhile, one of Chandler's old flames turns up out of the blue - and it seems it is not just a flying visit

programme.title: Kevin Bridges: A Whole Different Story
programme.desc: The comedian on stage at Glasgow's SSE Hydro during his 2015 stand-up tour. He entertains 12,000 fans with his thoughts on economic theory, art history and diet tips, as well as politics and the Scottish referendum. He also deals with the rigours of growing up and adapting to his new-found place in the world - coupled with the added novelty of having money for the first time

programme.title: Al Murray: Beautiful British Tour - Live at the O2
programme.desc: The pub landlord merrily muses over a range of topics at the London venue, including the global financial crisis and his one-man crusade to fix Broken Britain.

programme.desc: Aisha Tyler welcomes extreme sports star Tony Hawk to the comic improv show, alongside regulars Wayne Brady, Heather Anne Campbell, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.desc: Dangle is proposed to by his ex-wife's husband, and says yes. He has the men in his department be part of the wedding. Guest starring Zach Galifianakis

programme.desc: Two friends get into a beef at a club, Meegan and André have a serious talk, a rapper tries to walk out of an interview, Conrad flies business select and Keegan has a new moustache

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys try not to laugh while participating in a fake documentary interview with a stranger, and try to upcharge hotel customers with ridiculous services

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Got High
programme.desc: Monica's parents arrive for Thanksgiving, leading to trouble for Chandler, who discovers they don't like him because they think he uses drugs. Fortunately, their disapproval soon focuses on Ross instead. Comedy, guest starring Elliott Gould and Christina Pickles

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Apothecary Table
programme.desc: Joey finally dates Janine, but she does not like his friends. Rachel worries that Phoebe will not appreciate the way she has furnished their apartment owing to her 'environmental conscience'. Comedy, guest starring Elle Macpherson

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy bargains galore

programme.title: The Real Cruise People

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Princess Leia Fantasy
programme.desc: Ross foolishly lets Rachel in on his most secret sexual fantasy, while Phoebe consoles a heartbroken Monica and Chandler gets involved with an old flame whom Joey cannot stand. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One's Ready
programme.desc: Ross is due to make an important speech at the museum, and invites the gang along for moral support - but bickering and personal problems soon threaten to make him late. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe is alarmed to learn she has attracted the unwanted attentions of a stalker, and Monica comes up with a plan to deal with her broodiness. American comedy, guest starring David Arquette, with Lisa Kudrow and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Metaphorical Tunnel
programme.desc: Chandler ponders the importance of commitment, Monica starts work in a restaurant and Phoebe's home truths make her an unpopular choice as Joey's agent. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Actress Isabella Rossellini makes Ross's day by dropping into Central Perk for a coffee. Phoebe's efforts to introduce her half-brother to the city give him the wrong idea about her line of work. Comedy, with David Schwimmer, Lisa Kudrow and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Janice persuades the pals to reveal their deepest, darkest secrets about a period in their relationships three years earlier. Phoebe is trying to move out without telling Monica, Rachel wants one last fling before she gets married and Ross makes a distressing discovery. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Maggie Wheeler

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Race Car Bed
programme.desc: Monica buys a bed from Janice's husband but the wrong one is delivered. Joey gets a job teaching a soap opera acting class, while Rachel tries to ease the tension between Ross and her father

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Giant Poking Device
programme.desc: Phoebe convinces herself she is a walking jinx who keeps causing people to die mysteriously. Monica hides the fact that Ben has been injured, while Chandler and Janice make a tough decision about their relationship

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang holds an American football match on Thanksgiving. Opposing team captains Ross and Monica relive their sibling rivalry on the pitch, while Joey tries to outflank Chandler

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel hands in her notice at Central Perk, while Ross accidentally breaks a girl's leg and ends up having to go door to door peddling cookies. Joey starts a new job selling Christmas trees, but Phoebe thinks it is a cruel trade and sets about saving the merchandise

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Can't Remember Which Sister
programme.desc: Rachel's attractive and influential new friend sends Ross into a jealous frenzy, while Chandler gets drunk and falls for the curvaceous charms of one of Joey's many sisters - but later cannot remember which one

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Jealousy
programme.desc: Ross becomes increasingly jealous of Rachel's new workmate, and Joey auditions for a Broadway musical - even though he cannot dance. Meanwhile, Monica falls for a would-be poet

programme.title: The Jewel of the Nile (1985)
programme.desc: A novelist travels to the Middle East to become a sheik's official biographer, only to end up being held hostage by him. Her lover joins forces with an old enemy to rescue her, but they get drawn into the hunt for a mysterious ancient treasure that has a connection to an eccentric holy man. Comedy adventure, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Walshes reach Guatemala and pick up their new mode of transport, which quickly becomes a nightmare for Bradley to drive. They travel into the jungle, where they abseil down a cliff face into a waterfall and meet a quirky shaman who believes in the healing powers of chocolate. They then head off for a bike ride - but what Barney forgets to mention to his dad is that they are riding on a tightrope 25 metres in the air

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The father and son duo's road trip takes them to Nicaragua, where they meet some colourful characters in the local market, and get a taste of the national sport when they join a professional baseball team. With the country renowned for its volcanoes, the pair take one of their most dangerous and spectacular challenges, as they descend into an active volcano

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Monica and Richard Are Just Friends
programme.desc: Monica bumps into ex-boyfriend Richard in a video store and the pair agree it would be a mistake to start dating again - but soon fall back into bed. Meanwhile, Phoebe begins seeing an athlete. Tom Selleck guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's former singing partner turns up with the idea of using Smelly Cat in a commercial. Chandler dates a woman with a prosthetic leg, and Ross's jealousy gets the better of him. Sherilyn Fenn guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross and Rachel Take a Break
programme.desc: A harassed Rachel tells Ross she thinks they should take a break from each other - so he responds by getting drunk and sleeping with a woman Joey and Chandler have been chasing. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross tries to prevent Rachel discovering he slept with Chloe from the photocopying shop, but she finds out anyway and a major argument ensues at her apartment. Trapped in Monica's bedroom, the other friends cannot help overhearing everything

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Without the Ski Trip
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel's separation begins to cause friction among the pals, who feel they have to choose between the estranged pair - and an impending skiing holiday only makes matters worse. Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Hypnosis Tape
programme.desc: Phoebe is shocked to discover her half-brother Frank is planning to marry a woman more than twice his age. Chandler tries to stop smoking with the aid of hypnosis, only to suffer strange side-effects, and Monica gets a handy tip that could net her a small fortune

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the Saturday-night game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. programme.desc: The teenage duo are thrilled when their parents agree to let them go to Ibiza, and promptly embark on an increasingly desperate quest to find stardom as club DJs and lose their virginity on the sun-kissed shores - but seem certain to fail. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Dog (2022)

Comedy, co-directed by and starring Channing Tatum

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Jade, 24, sits down for a meal with Jak, 29, a yoga lover in touch with his spiritual side and who shares her love of exercise and tattoos, while fashion stylist Christine, 70, and entrepreneur Peter, 71, share stories of the Swinging Sixties. Health club manager Donna, 51, is a born romantic with old fashioned values at heart and her date is 53-year-old stetson-wearing Simon from Dallas, Texas, who's happy to stand out from the crowd and is looking for a strong woman to stand by his side

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dina, 39, is keen to settle down and start a family, but her date, 41-year-old Stephen, is a born adventurer who has climbed the Matterhorn and swum oceans. Will he run a mile when she shares her intentions with him? programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent takes her usual place in Dictionary Corner with David O'Doherty, while mathematics whizz Rachel Riley is on hand to provide the letters and numbers

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Chicago-based hardware retailer True Value's CEO and president John Hartmann poses as a handyman taking part in a reality show to go incognito among his own workforce to see how he can extend the company's lifespan and improve the experiences of both customers and employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bill Peduto, 60th Mayor of Pittsburgh, who comes from a proud family of Pennsylvania steel workers, goes incognito among his own workforce posing as a reality show contestant from Kentucky. In the 10 months since he was elected, many changes have been made in Pittsburgh and Bill wants to make sure they are effective and to hear directly from the city's employees

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

But it quickly became very cramped. The brothers get to work trying to highlight the home's Southern appeal, but will the process be smooth sailing?Short: After Samantha met Alex on a cruise ship, she moved into his tiny bachelor pad fixer-upper, with her two rescue dogs. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in Dartford and Beckenham, Kent. Jamie and his fiancée Carol kick off the competition with a party themed evening, inspired by their passion for all things 'crazy'. Unfortunately for them, a dessert proves almost inedible. Day two sees champagne lovers Paul and Justin hosting an international menu inspired by their extensive travels. Finally it's cockney couple Richard and Julie's chance to impress with a technical dessert and flavours designed to appeal to a mature palette

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the north east of England compete - loved-up musicians Nick and Kelly, laidback Michael and Becky, and Matthew and Katie with their refined French cuisine

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Rugby player Nick Royle from Widnes in Cheshire plans his wedding to Victoria Bilio. The couple had a difficult start when the bride was diagnosed with Guillain-Barre syndrome - an auto-immune disorder - just two months into their relationship, but the groom stood by his fiancee and now hopes to give her the ceremony of her dreams

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Darryl from Co Wicklow sets out to organise the perfect wedding for his childhood sweetheart Clodagh, and plans an outdoor reception in a home-made tipi decked with fairy lights

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Courtland Gray, the COO of audio equipment manufacturer Peavey Electronics, is poised to take over the Mississippi-based company when his stepfather, founder and CEO Hartley Peavey, is ready to hand over the reins. As he prepares to take full responsibility for the firm, Courtland dons a disguise to go incognito among the staff and find out how the frontline employees really feel

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Todd Pedersen, CEO and founder of Vivint, a leading solar and home security business, based in Utah, goes undercover among his own workforce posing as a contestant on a reality show. He's proud to head an organisation that provides a fun and relaxed work environment, but now that the company is offering smart home technology, it's in competition with much larger organisations, and Todd wants to make sure it's fully prepared to take them on

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Supercar fanatic Eddie Kaen has spent millions on the design of the Keating in San Diego, California, but neglected to invest in things the guests really need. Gordon Ramsay's visit uncovers empty rooms, a failing restaurant and staff at the end of their tether - leading to a shocking crisis that nobody saw coming

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits Meson de Mesilla, a Tuscan-style hotel in Las Cruces, New Mexico. Owner and former child-star Cali Szczawinski purchased the hotel so she could perform Cher songs every night to a captive audience, but Gordon investigates whether she may be falling flat when it comes to the needs of her guests because she's too busy trying to hit the high notes on stage

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey to transform Max's Bar & Grill. Even though it's been serving up famous hotdogs for almost 100 years, it's on the verge of crumbling, with over $1million of debt. The situation isn't helped by a power struggle between the divorced owners, who still work together

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Anglia, three couples compete to host the best dinner party. Chris and Debbie pull out all the stops with an evening of showbiz glitz and glamour, complete with Las Vegas-style dancing girls. Jake and Desiree's night is more chilled out, as they lay on some Caribbean flavours. Bickering duo Daisy and Will try to resolve their differences to pip their rivals to the prize

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. Andy Zaltzman, Babátúndé Aléshé, Emma Sidi, Jack Dee and Rosie Jones are the five phenoms who have willingly submitted to the toughest physical and mental examination on television, as Taskmaster returns for an 18th series. But will their attempts to defuse a large robot, push a golden envelope or simply count some chairs impress the Taskmaster, Greg Davies? In the first episode, Greg and his faultlessly loyal assistant Alex Horne welcome five fairly fresh bodies for a crack at TV's greatest prize: Greg's disembodied head, painted gold and stuck to a plinth. Andy Zaltzman, Babátúndé Aléshé, Emma Sidi, Jack Dee and Rosie Jones attempt to impress the Taskmaster by searching for a seal, hurling yoga balls in a theme park, and force-feeding Alex a bowlful of bubblegum

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Jonny claims to have dislocated his shoulder to get out of helping clean out the loft. Adam discovers he's lying and threatens to tell their mum - until his brother responds by promising to tell her about his blind date with Hayley Posner. Meanwhile, the boys' parents are not on speaking terms after an argument, with Dad revealing only that it is about something 'sexual'

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Mum has put Dad on a diet for two weeks, but he makes the boys smuggle in food for him - which he keeps hidden in the downstairs toilet. Later, returning from a spin in Jonny's new - and very uncool - company car, the family members find something awful has happened to their house. Comedy, starring Paul Ritter and Tamsin Greig

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy joins a band, but insists he is not going to be their roadie. Mark tries to forget Sophie by stalking shop assistant April - which results in him pretending to be signed up to the same history course as her. Offbeat comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Sophie tells Mark she and Jeff are moving in together, and the blow is compounded when she reveals she has been asked her to spend less time with him. Meanwhile, Jeremy becomes concerned about how his glum friend is coping with depression. Starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.desc: Lovebirds Gabz and Pete kick off the competition in and around Nottingham by cooking the food they fell in love eating together. On the last night, Lisa is left fuming and things get a bit awkward she and Peter and Lisa's cooking comes in for some unexpected criticism

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 24-year-old fisherman from Manorbier on the Pembrokeshire coast hopes to give his hairdresser fiancee her perfect wedding. However, the bride's phobia of boats and aversion to the sea could spell trouble for the groom, who dreams of having a nautical ceremony

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 22-year-old man hopes to give his fiancee of four months her perfect wedding. However, while bride Alex dreams of being surrounded by friends and family at a traditional ceremony, groom Luke wants to get married on the party island of Ibiza, where the couple first met

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 22-year-old care worker hopes to give his 25-year-old hairstylist fiancee the wedding of her dreams. However, the groom has a reputation for partying on a regular basis and being unreliable with money, and the bride's regular change of image makes it difficult for him to determine what type of ceremony would be to her liking

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former footballer Steven hopes to give his demanding fiancee Kayleigh the Wag wedding of her dreams, and arranges for the nuptials to take place at Thorpe Park in Surrey . However, plans for a pre-ceremony ride on an 80mph rollercoaster and a reception at the nearby conference centre fail to meet the bride's high standards

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Joe DiDomizio, CEO of travel retailer Hudson Group, goes undercover to ensure the company is fighting fit for the future. The businessman hopes to find that the company's vow to be 'the traveller's best friend' is being upheld by his employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the Larry H Miller Group of Companies and co-owner of National Basketball Association team the Utah Jazz, goes undercover. Since his father died he has made many changes to the organisation, and posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition to win a dream job, he works among his own staff to see if his dad's legacy still lives on

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell

Owner and former child-star Cali Szczawinski purchased the hotel so she could perform Cher songs every night to a captive audience, but Gordon investigates whether she may be falling flat when it comes to the needs of her guests because she's too busy trying to hit the high notes on stage

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in at the 90-year-old Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, where owner Phillip Lovingfoss has an apparent liking for alcohol that some of his staff claim is threatening to destroy the business. The challenge of turning around the hotel's fortunes only increases when the chef sees shocking allegations about Phillip splashed all over the front page of the local newspaper

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: In Oregon, Gordon Ramsay tries to rescue the Applegate River Lodge, which is around $1million in debt. The chef questions whether owner Richard Davis's interest in smoking cannabis is distracting him from the problems at this family-built inn, and encounters Richard's sons Duke and Dusty, whose fiery relationship seems to prevent them from working together to tackle the establishment's financial troubles

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Starkville, Mississippi, to try to rescue the failing Hotel Chester. Despite having more than 40 years' experience in the business, owner David Mollendor is at a loss as to how to make his dream of owning his own hotel work, while his wife Sukie is struggling as its chef, tackling the role without any formal catering experience. Gordon discovers a family tragedy that explains why this couple have become trapped in their business and wrestling with debt

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits a dog-friendly hotel in West Dover, Vermont, that is in urgent need of help. Owner Sandy MacDougall runs the Four Seasons Inn like a hostel, with unpaid staff staying in the rooms instead of paying guests. The acerbic chef aims to get the business back on track before Sandy loses everything, but wonders whether it would be kinder to simply put this dog-friendly hotel to sleep

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's new job at the department store is put in jeopardy when Beverly takes advantage of her daughter's employee discount too frequently. Meanwhile, during a trip to the horse racing track, Pops bends the truth to convince Barry that his bad luck has changed for the better. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Steph and Billy, their best man George and bridesmaid Becca relive the unforgettable piggy wedding that shocked many back in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters.
