programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Chris Thormann must confront the fact that the assailant who shot and blinded him is up for parole - and he might get it

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the world's oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capital's love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the city's first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the city's biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Chris Thormann must confront the fact that the assailant who shot and blinded him is up for parole - and he might get it

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street

A diamond ring with great sentimental value disappeared from the woman's finger after the body was found, and proves pivotal to the case

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberland's Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)
programme.desc: Youngster Billy Batson is chosen by the ancient wizard Shazam as his new champion, and receives various superpowers. Together with his best friend Freddy Freeman, Billy must come to terms with his new talents in order to stop the evil Dr Thaddeus Sivana. Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Green Lantern (2011)
programme.desc: A cocky test pilot is given a mysterious ring by a dying alien and transported to another world, where he learns he has been recruited into a galactic peacekeeping organisation. He trains to use the incredible powers the ring grants him, and returns to Earth to defend it from a powerful force that feeds on fear. Sci-fi adventure, starring Ryan Reynolds, Blake Lively, Peter Sarsgaard and Mark Strong

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)
programme.desc: Youngster Billy Batson is chosen by the ancient wizard Shazam as his new champion, and receives various superpowers. Together with his best friend Freddy Freeman, Billy must come to terms with his new talents in order to stop the evil Dr Thaddeus Sivana. Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: Clash of the Titans (2010)
programme.desc: The son of the Greek god Zeus is raised by humans and grows up to reject his immortal heritage in anger at the gods' cruel treatment of humans. He sets out on a quest to find a means to kill the evil lord of the underworld in revenge for his father's death, facing all manner of strange creatures. Mythological adventure, with Sam Worthington, Liam Neeson, Ralph Fiennes and Gemma Arterton

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess who grows up in enchanted realm has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War. American airman Steve Trevor crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in an attempt to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Director Patty Jenkins' blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man (2012)
programme.desc: A gifted teenager investigates the secrets hidden in his dead parents' past, leading him to a mysterious corporation and an incident that imbues him with superhuman powers. A personal tragedy drives him to use his new-found abilities to fight crime, and he is soon drawn into a deadly battle against a former colleague of his father, who has undergone a devastating transformation of his own. Superhero adventure reboot, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone and Rhys Ifans

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2 (2014)
programme.desc: The webslinging hero battles a powerful new enemy when a downtrodden engineer develops lethal electrical powers, which he unleashes on those he believes have betrayed him. As if that wasn't enough to keep him busy, he faces an even greater threat when he is reunited with an unstable old friend who has been charged with a sinister mission by his dying father, leading to a series of tense confrontations that threaten to change his life for ever. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Jamie Foxx and Dane DeHaan

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Final Score (2018)
programme.desc: An ex-soldier is forced into action when armed terrorists take control of a packed football stadium. Action drama, starring Dave Bautista, Pierce Brosnan and Ray Stevenson

programme.title: Clash of the Titans (2010)

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: An American youngster goes to live in China with his mother, where he becomes an outsider and falls foul of the local bullies. He receives help from the kindly school caretaker, who turns out to be a kung fu master and offers to train the boy to defend himself. Martial arts drama, with Jaden Smith and Jackie Chan

programme.title: Little Fockers (2010)
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the game's wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level (2019)
programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the world's most dangerous game. Director Jake Kasdan's fantasy adventure sequel to his 2017 rebooted hit Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again (2018)
programme.desc: It's five years since Sophie invited her three possible dads to her wedding, and now most of her family are reunited as she prepares for the grand reopening of the Hotel Bella Donna. Along the way, she learns more about her mother's past. Abba-themed musical sequel, starring Amanda Seyfried, Lily James, Pierce Brosnan, Cher and Andy Garcia

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alan's brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick

programme.title: Just Go with It (2011)
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon pretends to be unhappily married to seduce women. When his girlfriend finds his prop wedding ring, he claims he is getting a divorce and has to persuade his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife, but is forced to come up with yet more lies to maintain the illusion. Romantic comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Jennifer Aniston and Nicole Kidman

programme.title: Honey Don't (2025)
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: Fuze (2026)
programme.desc: An unexploded Second World War bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation. Drama, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Theo James, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Sam Worthington

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: Fuze (2026)
programme.desc: An unexploded Second World War bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation. Drama, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Theo James, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Sam Worthington

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: The Bride! (2026)
programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

Supernatural horror, starring Marlon Wayans and Tyriq Withers

Among the topics covered are his big break into the movie industry, his failed marriage to Ali McGraw, his relationships with Grace Kelly and Ava Gardner, his descent into drug addiction, and his journey back to respectability. With contributions by friends and family, and including footage of a host of Hollywood legends

programme.desc: Documentary following two fans in search of their musical idol. American singer Sixto Rodriguez enjoyed a brief recording career in the 1970s before fading into obscurity. However, his politically conscious music became incredibly popular in South Africa. Bizarre stories of his death had circulated over the years, but two devotees plan to find out what really became of him

programme.title: Wirecard: A Billion Euro Lie
programme.desc: Documentary lifting the lid on the scandal that rocked the financial sector across the globe - the rise and billion-dollar fall of financial payment firm Wirecard

programme.title: When We Were Kings (1996)
programme.desc: Leon Gast's Oscar-winning documentary charting the challenge of an ageing Muhammad Ali for George Foreman's World Heavyweight title held in Zaire in 1974. The film explores the impact of Ali's visit to Africa before focusing on the epic fight, dubbed the 'Rumble in the Jungle', which has gone down in history as one of the greatest of all time. Spike Lee and Norman Mailer are among the contributors offering personal opinions on its importance to them

programme.title: Dogtown and Z-Boys
programme.desc: Documentary charting the history of skateboarding, from its 1970s emergence as a land-based form of surfing in Los Angeles and its subsequent explosion of popularity worldwide, to its current status as a widely-practised extreme sport. programme.title: Sergio Leone: The Italian Who Invented America

programme.title: Missile from the East (2021)
programme.desc: The true story of Ernst Degner, a champion East German motorcycle racer who risked his life defecting to West Germany during the Swedish Grand Prix in 1961

programme.title: I'm Chevy Chase and You're Not
programme.desc: Chevy Chase was a cast member on the inaugural series of Saturday Night Live and he built on that success to star in numerous Hollywood comedies and host the Academy Awards. He played hapless father Clark Griswold in the National Lampoon films and ran amok in pictures including Caddyshack, Spies Like Us, Fletch and Three Amigos. Two-time Emmy Award winner Marina Zenovich directs an authorised feature-length documentary portrait of Chase, which includes rare and intimate home movies and archive footage. Chase and his family share memories directly to camera, enriched with contributions from friends and collaborators including Dan Aykroyd, Beverly D'Angelo, Goldie Hawn, Lorne Michaels, Ryan Reynolds and Martin Short.

programme.title: I Am Richard Pryor
programme.desc: Documentary reflecting on the highs and lows of the comedian and actor's life, featuring interviews with Mike Epps, Tiffany Haddish and his widow Jennifer Lee

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The England netball international talks about her idol

programme.title: Salt Path: A Very British Scandal
programme.desc: A look at Observer journalist Chloe Hadjimatheou's investigation into allegations of factual inaccuracies in Raynor Winn's book The Salt Path

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: British tennis star Heather Watson discusses the individuals who have inspired her over the course of her life

programme.title: Going Clear: Scientology and the Prison of Belief (2015)
programme.desc: Alex Gibney's documentary, based on Lawrence Wright's book, sheds light on the controversial religious movement, from its roots in the mind of founder L Ron Hubbard through to its rise in popularity in Hollywood and beyond. The film also profiles eight former members of the Church of Scientology, including Oscar-winning screenwriter and director Paul Haggis, who offer their perspective on the actions of the organisation's leaders past and present

programme.title: Chernobyl: The Lost Tapes

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: Nasa footage of reported UFOs and alien presence, with comment from former Apollo astronaut Edgar Mitchell, and ex-Nasa contractor Donna Hare

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: Rick Edwards and Beau Ouimette look for evidence of Roman life in Scotland, heading to Ardoch Fort in Perthshire, on the east bank of the River Knaik. It spans over eight and a half acres and was built under Agricola around 80AD on the east bank of the River Knaik. The fort occupied a key strategic route through Perthshire and into north-east Scotland from the First to Third centuries

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands search for the remains of a First World War stable at Catterick Garrison in North Yorkshire, where thousands of horses would have been housed and trained for the front line. They join a team comprised of archaeologists and the military attempting to uncover the role this building played in the war effort. They also visit Britain's oldest cavalry regiment, examining tools that soldiers would have used to look after their steeds, and hear the story of Warrior, known as the horse the German's could not kill

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: A secret military base discovered a few hundred miles from the North Pole. A man-made, ancient stone formation is found 120ft below the surface of Lake Huron. A 1,500-year-old burial ground is discovered on the shores of the Baltic Sea. Plus, in Russia's far east, a life-form that scientists think can live for thousands of years is discovered in the permafrost

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: While exploring the Ottawa Valley, the pickers come across an old English manor filled with five generations of valuable antiques

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

Fifty years after the book's publication, experts contemplate whether he is he about to be proven right and that extraterrestrials with a superior knowledge of science and engineering did indeed land on Earth thousands of years ago

programme.title: History of Weapons
programme.desc: Experts take a look at three weapons that have been used to attack civilian populations, including the brutal trebuchet catapult and, possibly the most terrifying of all, the atomic bomb

Fifty years after the book's publication, experts contemplate whether he is he about to be proven right and that extraterrestrials with a superior knowledge of science and engineering did indeed land on Earth thousands of years ago

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The story of one of the world's most effective war machines ­ the Viking longship. Its design evolved from swift war canoe to versatile and feared ship, changing the course of history

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The vessels that operate in secret, unseen by their enemies, from secret missions that helped win the Second World War to modern stealth ships using strange shapes and technology to avoid spying ears and eyes

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: How bad design, human error and the enemy sent great ships to tragic ends, such as Britain's K13 submarine and HMS Hood, Sweden's 17th-century Vasa, and Kublai Khan's fleet, sunk by the original kamikaze

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The ships that made mighty empires, from the lone wolves that patrolled the high seas for imperial Britain to the USS Laffey's heroic Second World War battle against kamikazes at Okinawa

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: Stories of espionage at sea, including deadly U-boat cat-and-mouse games during the Great War, the sinking of the Lusitania, a gun-smuggling private yacht that made history and liners-turned-troopships

programme.sub-title: Project Iceworm, Mystery of Sea Lab, Soviet Night Witches, Weirdest Tank Ever
programme.desc: Veterans Rudy Reyes and Ronnie Adkins break down the evidence behind the most mysterious photos, films, and recordings in battlefield history. This episode considers what dangerous materials are held in an abandoned American Cold War military base in the Northern Arctic and whether a saboteur really did shut down the US Navy's classified Sea Lab

programme.title: Greatest Prison Escapes with Billy Hayes
programme.desc: Billy focuses his attentions on the notorious Texas 7, a group of prisoners who escaped from the John B Connally Unit near Kenedy, Texas, in December 2000. They employed strength, wit, disguises and plenty of teamwork to achieve the feat

programme.title: Greatest Prison Escapes with Billy Hayes
programme.desc: Hayes recalls how eight inmates escaped from the Curry County Adult Detention Center in Clovis, New Mexico, in August 2008 after climbing prison pipes, using homemade instruments to carve a hole in the roof and leaping from the building

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Startling discoveries that shocked and terrified the world, from a mythical monster that turned out to be real, to a deadly prehistoric animal, and a frozen tundra hiding a pandora's box full of lethal pathogens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

Fifty years after the book's publication, experts contemplate whether he is he about to be proven right and that extraterrestrials with a superior knowledge of science and engineering did indeed land on Earth thousands of years ago

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A team of scientists examines the remains of the Puma Punku temple in Bolivia in a bid to determine whether it could have been designed and constructed by extraterrestrials

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: Events involving military and intelligence agencies, with suggestions of cover-ups relating to two unexplained incidents in the east of England in 1956 and 1980

programme.title: Invasion: The Normans
programme.desc: Two-part documentary exploring the Anglo-Norman invasion of Ireland. The first edition opens in the turmoil of 12th-century Ireland, where provincial kings compete for supremacy. When two of these power players drive a rival into exile, he seeks help from Henry II, the Anglo-Norman king of England. Henry's vassal Strongbow and other Norman allies then invade Ireland

programme.title: Invasion: The Normans
programme.desc: The second of the two-part documentary follows the course of the invasion, as Strongbow wins victory after victory. In 1171 Henry II arrived to takes control of Ireland, and he granted land there to settlers from Britain. Now archaeology and cutting-edge science reveal their fascinating lives. The episode also shows how the conquest of Ireland enabled centuries of war between England and France

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Visits to the most remote, cold and inhospitable places on the planet to reveal great mysteries that have been frozen in time. This edition features a giant naval vessel located on the bottom of the Norwegian Sea and an ancient reptile-like creature found in the permafrost of Canada's Arctic. In Scotland, archaeologists are drawn to a strange, figure-eight shaped ditch, while an Antarctic research base finds itself suddenly surrounded by blood-soaked snow

programme.title: Canadian Pickers

programme.desc: A look at some of the most incredible escapes of the conflict, as captured soldiers, sailors and airmen on both sides dared the impossible to win their freedom. They dug tunnels, stole planes, forced their way through deadly jungles, and marched huge distances pursued by death squads. This episodes focuses on Colditz Castle, the Great Escape and the bold Warburg Wire Job

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII
programme.desc: In September 1939 German forces invaded Poland as four Luftwaffe bomber groups attacked Warsaw. By September 6, the city's anti-aircraft defences had been reduced to a few guns and much of the Polish capital was in ruins. The bomber aircraft dominated the skies throughout the rest of the Second World War as fleets stood ready on the airfields of every combatant nation

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII
programme.desc: On September 1 1939 German forces invaded Poland as four Luftwaffe bomber groups attacked Warsaw. By September 6 the city's anti-aircraft defences had been reduced to a few guns and much of the Polish capital was in ruins. The bomber aircraft dominated the skies throughout the rest of the Second World War as fleets stood ready on the airfields of every combatant nation

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.sub-title: Invincible - The Royal Navy's Greatest Ship
programme.desc: Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands examine the history of HMS Invincible, which was captured from the French in 1747 and helped transform the Royal Navy with the lessons it taught about organisation and ship design. For more than 260 years, HMS Invincible lay at the bottom of the Solent, but archaeologists are now diving beneath the waves in a £2m excavation to discover more about this game-changing ship

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: Archaeologists conduct a dig at Auckland Castle in Co Durham, which 700 years ago was home to a group of power-crazed bishops who behaved more like warriors than religious leaders. The experts head to Dirleton Castle in East Lothian to reveal the role one of the men played in defending England from William Wallace's army, and also try their hands at the art of stained glass-making, and fire a working trebuchet - the ultimate medieval weapon of war

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: Centuries ago, canals were the liquid highways of Britain, transporting raw materials and finished goods all over the country. Their arrival kick-started the Industrial Revolution, which was to turn Britain into a superpower. The very first water superhighway was the Bridgewater Canal, completed in 1761 to carry coal to Manchester from the mines in Worsley. Here, a team of archaeologists from Salford University roots out this industrial past, working with volunteers to excavate the very coal mine that inspired the creation of the canal

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The role of ships during the Cold War, featuring a look at two submarines - former enemies - now moored in a Kent river. Plus, the story of Soviet submariner Vasili Arkhipov, who refused to authorise a nuclear launch

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Exploring how Lawrence of Arabia used guerilla warfare against the Ottoman Empire's railways. programme.title: Combat Machines
programme.desc: Machines that would have been used had a stand-off resulted in all-out nuclear war, from the smallest tactical nuke to an experimental flying jeep

programme.title: Cursed Histories
programme.desc: More instances of the granting of so-called 'curses'. This episode highlights the Egyptian royals who promised turmoil for anyone who dares disturb their 'eternal rest'. Plus, a devilish figure at the Mississippi crossroads who granted great musical talents in exchange for a bluesman's soul and the pantheon of gods with the apparent power to punish any accursed name carved into dark tablets of ancient lead

programme.title: Cursed Histories
programme.desc: Elements, places, icons or events that seem to be plagued by what can only be described as a 'curse'. This episode focuses on a 'damned' amethyst gem, a devilish beast and the downfall of a family for several generations.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From priceless treasure found inside a lost city, to an ancient manuscript hidden behind a wall, Danny explores mysterious secrets lost deep inside various unseen chambers, including tunnels, caves and burial sites

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft

programme.desc: Lisa comes to Montebello with a clear mind, intent on letting the lockers 'speak' to her. Ivy lets his son navigate his way to a unit which turns out not to be completely vacant. Kenny is absolutely appalled by what he finds abandoned in his unit

programme.desc: Brandi is determined to actually win a locker for once in Santa Ana, but has to show restraint to do it. Rene spots a stack of items in a locker that 'speaks' to him. Kenny puts his needs out to the universe, while Barry struggles to stay in the game

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Does a Bear Bid in the Woods?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy kidnaps Pops and takes him to Rosamond, where they deftly score a fine locker. Kenny sets out to brighten everyone's day and his clowning around has him seeing stars. Lisa proves she has a friend - for now

programme.title: The Mystery of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: Mentioned in the Gospel of John, the Holy Lance is known as the weapon used by Roman legionary Longinus to pierce Christ's side after his crucifixion. According to legend, whoever possesses it becomes invincible and capable of ruling the world. Throughout history, the Lance have been sought after by many ambitious leaders, such as Emperor Constantine, Napoleon, Barbarossa and Hitler. This documentary combines scientific investigation with the latest historical research to explore the 2,000 year-long history of this captivating artefact

programme.title: Pharaohs at War
programme.sub-title: Thutmose III - The Battle of Megiddo
programme.desc: Documentary detailing decisive confrontations between pharaohs and their greatest rivals in Ancient Egypt, which defined the legacy of one of history's most iconic civilisations. This episode focuses on the Battle of Megiddo which, fought in 1457 BC, was a significant military engagement led by Pharaoh Thutmose III against a Canaanite coalition. It resulted in a decisive Egyptian victory, solidifying their dominance in the Near East

programme.title: Pharaohs at War
programme.sub-title: Ramses II - The Battle of Kadesh
programme.desc: The Battle of Kadesh, fought in 1275 BCE between the Egyptian Empire led by pharaoh Ramesses II and the Hittite Empire led by king Muwatalli II. In one of the world's largest chariot battles, fought beside the Orontes River, Ramses sought to wrest Canaan and Syria from the Hittites and recapture the city of Kadesh. There was a day of carnage as approximately 5,000 chariots charged into the fray, but no outright victor. Ultimately, the battle led to the world's first recorded peace treaty

programme.title: Pharaohs at War
programme.sub-title: Ptolemy IV - The Battle of Raphia
programme.desc: The Battle of Raphia, fought in 217 BC near modern Rafah, which was a pivotal clash between Ptolemaic Egypt and the Seleucid Empire during the Fourth Syrian War. The outcome was a decisive victory for Ptolemy IV Philopator's forces, which secured Coele-Syria for Ptolemaic Egypt

programme.title: Pharaohs at War
programme.desc: A look at the Battle of Actium in 31 BC, a decisive naval engagement that pitted the forces of Octavian against those of Roman politician and general Mark Antony and Egyptian ruler Cleopatra. This clash, near the Roman colony of Actium in Greece, marked the end of the Roman Republic's civil war era and the beginning of the Roman Empire under Octavian's rule

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In a Roman-themed first edition, she examines the mystery surrounding the skeletons of 97 babies found beside the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon and a cult figure buried for 1,700 years beneath a fort

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores archaeological digs at sites dating back to the Viking age, offering an insight into how the seafaring warriors from Scandinavia lived across Britain. In the Outer Hebrides, she examines signs of the earliest Norse settlers, before inspecting a collection of silver and gold pieces discovered in York. There is also a look at some of the most treasured Viking finds, including 12th-century ivory chess figures the Lewis Chessmen

programme.title: Flying Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the world of the pterosaur, a flying creature that occupied the skies 200 million years ago. Visiting sites around the world, from the Dorset coast to New Mexico, he explains how the reptiles evolved to defy the forces of gravity, and examines the features of their anatomy that can still be seen in present-day descendents. He also discovers why they became extinct after dominating the skies for millions of years

programme.title: David Attenborough's Dragons and Damsels
programme.desc: Arguably more beautiful than butterflies, better fliers than hummingbirds and with intriguing and complex behavioural patterns - dragonflies and damselflies are marvels of the insect kingdom. This documentary uses the latest camera technology to show their manoeuvres, mating strategies, territorial behaviour and flight dynamics, revealing them to be the ultimate insect

programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: Part one of two. The naturalist explores the evolution of vertebrates over the past 500 million years, beginning with a look at how remarkable advances allowed primitive fish to make the radical move on to land, and then take to the skies with the advent of flight. He uses fossils of both ancient and living species combined with CGI and film to chart their journey out of the water to populate all corners of the globe

programme.title: David Attenborough's Rise of Animals

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.desc: The crew encounters a potent and dangerous particle, considered by the Borg to be perfection itself. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kate Mulgrew

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The survivors of the attack on the prison try to come to terms with their new surroundings, and Rick tries to lead Carl to safety, but the former lawman is badly injured. Starring Andrew Lincoln and Chandler Riggs

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Britannia

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Cait and Divis make their way to a new safe haven following their narrow escape. Meanwhile, Hella pays Aulus a visit, and Phelan completes his mission

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: An awkward dream causes tension in Divis and Cait's relationship. Meanwhile, Harka sends Love on a heart-breaking mission, and Veran betrays Amena

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer (2013)
programme.desc: A farm boy accidentally rebuilds the link between the human world and a kingdom of man-eating giants in the sky, resulting in a princess being trapped in the monsters' realm. He joins a band of the king's knights on a rescue mission, but one of the group intends to betray them in a bid to seize the throne. Fantasy adventure, starring Nicholas Hoult and Ewan McGregor

programme.title: Hook (1991)
programme.desc: Peter Pan, who has finally grown up and is now a married lawyer with a family of his own, is whisked away by Tinkerbell to Neverland, where he must learn to fly again if he is to save his children from the clutches of Captain Hook. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure, with Robin Williams, Dustin Hoffman, Julia Roberts, Bob Hoskins and Maggie Smith

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village (2017)
programme.desc: A mysterious map sends Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on a quest into the Forbidden Forest, leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history. Animated adventure, with the voices of Demi Lovato, Julia Roberts, Rainn Wilson and Joe Manganiello

programme.title: The NeverEnding Story (1984)
programme.desc: A lonely boy, neglected by his father and bullied at school, finds comfort in a mysterious book about a young hero's quest to save his world from destruction. However, as he reads the tale, he begins to become part of the story. Fantasy adventure based on Michael Ende's novel, starring Barret Oliver, Noah Hathaway, Gerald McRaney, Moses Gunn and Patricia Hayes

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefact's twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village (2017)
programme.desc: A mysterious map sends Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on a quest into the Forbidden Forest, leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history. Animated adventure, with the voices of Demi Lovato, Julia Roberts, Rainn Wilson and Joe Manganiello

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz (1939)
programme.desc: Youngster Dorothy Gale is whisked over the rainbow by a tornado into the magical land of Oz, where she inadvertently kills a wicked witch - incurring the wrath of another. Setting out to find the wizard who can show her a way home, she is joined on her journey by a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who all hope their own wishes will be granted. Musical fantasy, with Judy Garland, Ray Bolger, Jack Haley, Bert Lahr and Frank Morgan

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: The NeverEnding Story (1984)
programme.desc: A lonely boy, neglected by his father and bullied at school, finds comfort in a mysterious book about a young hero's quest to save his world from destruction. However, as he reads the tale, he begins to become part of the story. Fantasy adventure based on Michael Ende's novel, starring Barret Oliver, Noah Hathaway, Gerald McRaney, Moses Gunn and Patricia Hayes

programme.title: Robin and the Hoods (2024)
programme.desc: For the tenacious 11-year-old Robin and her loyal band of friends, the Hoods, the patch of overgrown scrubland at the end of their cul-de-sac is a magical kingdom. However, when the slippery property developer Clipboard dazzles the parents of the area with promises of health spas and day-care facilities, the gang risk losing their kingdom forever. Director Phil Hawkins' comedy, starring Naomie Harris, Darcey Ewart, Gwendoline Christie and Mark Williams

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: Batman (1989)
programme.desc: The masked avenger stalks the streets of Gotham City, waging a nightly war against the criminal element. However, he may have met his match when the city's crime syndicate is taken over by the crazed Joker, who plans to poison the populace with toxic chemicals. Tim Burton's comic-book adventure, starring Michael Keaton, Jack Nicholson and Kim Basinger

programme.title: Batman Returns (1992)
programme.desc: The masked hero returns to face the Penguin, a grotesque crime boss dwelling in the sewers who conspires with a corrupt businessman to make himself mayor. When the tycoon tries to kill his secretary, she returns as vengeful vigilante Catwoman, who soon forms an intense relationship with the dark knight in both their costumed and real identities. Tim Burton's comic-book adventure sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Danny DeVito and Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.title: Batman Forever (1995)
programme.desc: The masked crimefighter takes on the twin threats of disfigured maniac Two-Face and insane genius the Riddler, who are plotting to control the brains of the entire world. Meanwhile, an acrobat whose family has been murdered by Two-Face steps up to join Batman in his fight against evil. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Nicole Kidman, Jim Carrey and Chris O'Donnell

programme.title: Batman & Robin (1997)
programme.desc: The caped crusader and his sidekick take on the villainous Mr Freeze, who plans to destroy Gotham City with an icy doomsday weapon unless his demands are met. The dynamic duo also have to contend with femme fatale Poison Ivy, who is determined to drive a wedge between them. Comic-book adventure, starring George Clooney, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Uma Thurman and Chris O'Donnell

programme.desc: Sheldon petitions Wil Wheaton to allow him to appear on the new Professor Proton show, so the actor offers a guest appearance to Amy instead. Meanwhile, Penny gets angry when she thinks the female protagonist in Leonard's novel is based on her

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette's friends each try different tactics to help her go into labour. Howard isn't happy when he finds out that Bernadette has already chosen their son's name without his input

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy, Howard and Bernadette have a difficult time deciding which one of them should stay at home with the kids and who should return to work

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets the opportunity to spend time with Bill Gates at work, because his business wants to partner with her pharmaceutical company. Leonard, Howard and Raj do everything in their power to also meet the high-tech entrepreneur, while Sheldon thinks he's the victim of an April Fool's Day prank

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Valentine's Day sees Molly play Cupid. After hearing Harry's tragic break-up story, she attempts to pair him with her sister Victoria. Meanwhile, Carl and Samuel try to pick up single women at the Laundromat. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike decides to take things into his own hands in his quest to find out if he is fertile enough to get Molly pregnant. Meanwhile, Vince starts working as a door-to-door vacuum cleaner salesman. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike storms off over a disagreement with Molly, so she decides to go on a shopping spree at the mall. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Pish Posh and a Secret Back Room
programme.desc: Meemaw opens a gambling room, while Sheldon, Missy and Georgie adapt to new living arrangements. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Annie Potts

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Animals and a Sweet Southern Syzgy
programme.desc: Georgie has a solution for Meemaw's business woes, Sheldon and Dr Linkletter struggle to solve an equation and George Sr gives Missy advice on her love life

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Money Laundering and a Cascade of Hormones
programme.desc: Missy asks some uncomfortable questions at church, while Meemaw and Georgie go into business together. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard runs against Sheldon to be president of the tenants' association, while Bernadette encourages Howard and Raj to track down the owner of a drone they find in the back garden

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A brilliant but reclusive scientist, Dr Wolcott, invites Sheldon to his cabin in the middle of nowhere, so Leonard, Raj and Howard go along for the trip. Penny and Bernadette improvise when Amy doesn't like the tame bachelorette party they have planned for her. Peter MacNicol guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon isn't pleased by the newfound popularity of Stuart's comic book shop when an author puts the place on the map. When Raj attempts to take the credit for Penny's astronomical discovery, friendships are tested. Howard and Bernadette try to arrange a date night

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to Las Vegas and does everything he can to win a large sum of money for science. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette take Amy shopping for a wedding dress, but her terrible choice entangles them in a web of lies

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns that his mother won't attend his wedding unless he invites his brother Georgie, he and Leonard travel to Texas to end a family feud. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette's children inadvertently give them, Amy and Raj conjunctivitis. Jerry O'Connell guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Friends and family gather as Amy and Sheldon prepare to tie the knot - but it seems the happy couple's minds are elsewhere. Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik star, with guest appearances from Laurie Metcalf, Kathy Bates, Mark Hamill, Jerry O'Connell and Teller (the quiet half of US magic duo Penn and Teller)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's honeymoon runs aground in New York, Penny and Leonard discover that they are uncomfortably similar to Amy's parents, while Raj insults astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and starts a war on social media. Kathy Bates and Teller (of Penn and Teller fame) guest star as Amy's parents

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy drive themselves to distraction trying to figure out what the 'perfect gift' is that Leonard and Penny have got them for their wedding. Meanwhile, Raj decides he wants to settle down and asks his father to arrange a marriage for him

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Before the 90 Days
programme.desc: Part one of two. The couples share the latest updates on their relationships. A new confession cam captures unfiltered opinions, and tensions are at an all-time high.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programme.sub-title: The Act of Making it Official
programme.desc: Gino files for divorce from Jasmine and finds new love. Kim and Wayne decide their relationship status. Cortney kicks out Colt. Pedro ghosts Sophie.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jason isolates due to a giant neck growth. Marisa dreads spider veins after surgery and Kobe hums to stay calm as a huge bump near his eye is removed.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dr. Lee and Zoe treat Mary Ann's crusty skin. Isaiah ignores a lump on his spine and Maressa fears treating the oozing skin covering her ankles.

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: At 700 pounds, 35-year-old Margaret is virtually bedbound. It's time for her to overcome her food addiction so she can finally live her life

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Jo and Al show bride Ciara the perfect dress does not have to be way over budget, and after a mastectomy, bride Joanna has an ingenious way to get her curves back

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Levi has lost three dress sizes since she bought her 50s-style wedding dress, so Jo and Al try to find her one that fits. Plus, Caroline is losing sleep over her gown

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Terrified bride Kirsty longs for a confidence-boosting gown. Meanwhile, tomboy bride Laura never wears dresses, so Jo and Al try to convince her to embrace her feminine side

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Chloe goes dress shopping with her mum, but worries her voice won't be heard. Elsewhere, Diane has waited 25 years to go dress shopping for her wedding to Kathy

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Georgie enlists the help of drama teacher Mr Lundy for a surprising business venture, while Sheldon campaigns to become Dr Linkletter's lab assistant

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Pager, a Club and a Cranky Bag of Wrinkles
programme.desc: Dr Linkletter pushes Sheldon to make friends with his fellow students at college, and Georgie gets a pager

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Box of Treasure and the Meemaw of Science
programme.desc: Meemaw takes part in a scientific experiment, and Sheldon introduces a new club named Silence Club. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: The Geezer Bus and a New Model for Education
programme.desc: After being in a car accident with Meemaw, Sheldon refuses to ride in a car, with Missy using their trauma to her advantage at school. Meemaw is forced to take the church shuttle while her car is being fixed

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Mitch's Son and the Unconditional Approval of a Government Agency
programme.desc: The IRS accuses Sheldon of making a mistake and he stops at nothing to prove them wrong, while Dale is forced to get a colonoscopy and tries to convince Meemaw to join him

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Virus, Heartbreak and a World of Possibilities
programme.desc: Mary and Meemaw takes Brenda on a girls' night out, while Sheldon is caught in a moral dilemma when offered a bootleg copy of a computer game he cannot afford. Missy ask Georgie to take her and Marcus on a secret date

programme.title: Georgie and Mandy's First Marriage
programme.desc: Mandy's attempt to help Missy with boys backfires when Mary finds out and Georgie is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Georgie and Mandy's First Marriage
programme.desc: When CeeCee loses her favourite toy, Mandy and Meemaw take it as an opportunity to make some money.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Leonard isn't happy when he finds out that Penny's brother is coming to town so that she can help him to find a job. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Cut off from his father's fortune, Raj struggles to balance his books, so decides to appoint Sheldon to organise his finances and get him out of debt. Penny considers joining the guys at Comic-Con because she thinks Leonard wants her to come along

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny offer Sheldon's old room to Raj after he is forced to move out of his apartment to save money, leading to unexpected conflict among the gang and some unwanted observations from Leonard's mother. Christine Baranski guests

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on two scientific projects - one with Leonard and Howard, plus another with Amy - on the same day. Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave, and looks forward to returning to work

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette find it upsetting to leave baby Halley at the nursery when Bernadette returns to work at the end of her maternity leave. The gang's university colleague Bert the geologist introduces them to his attractive new girlfriend Rebecca

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard isn't thrilled when he finds out Penny is considering taking a new job that has been offered to her by her former boyfriend Zack. Sheldon attempts to develop his brain further by learning new skills

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is offered a visiting research fellowship at Princeton University, and Raj makes some new living arrangements. When the guys complete their infinite persistence gyroscope project, events spin out of control

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang become concerned when Sheldon's former admirer Dr Ramona Nowitzki resurfaces while Amy is away working at Princeton University. Jim Parsons stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy must decide whether or not to marry Sheldon and gives him an answer to his proposal. Howard and Bernadette struggle with some unexpected news. With guest stars Laurie Metcalf, Riki Lindhome and Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard angers the university - and the entire physics community - when he gives an embarrassing interview. Amy and Bernadette bond over having to hide their success from Sheldon and Howard. Ira Flatow and Regina King guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Sheldon stresses out about picking a wedding date, Amy tries to convince him that he has a more laid-back side. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart compete to win the heart of Bernadette's new colleague Ruchi. Swati Kapila guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is devastated when his mother befriends Penny. Howard and Sheldon bond when they drive into the desert to shoot off a model rocket. Christine Baranski guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Raj turn to Bernadette for advice about their jealousy when Amy and Howard decide to collaborate on a new project. Penny and Leonard learn some new ways to manage Sheldon's irksome behaviour from an unlikely source

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon competes with Wil Wheaton (guest starring as himself) for the role of the new Professor Proton when the scientist's old TV series gets a reboot. Penny looks after Halley when Howard and Bernadette are both put on bed rest

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: J-Fab is the life of the party, but her shoulder bump is seriously cramping her style. Teresa's red face and bumpy nose make her feel like a monster

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Robert carries the weight of providing for his family and the weight of the huge lump on his head. Christina has big, veiny, liquid-filled balloons next to her eyes

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Nhan has an extreme, red birthmark that covers half his face, while Debbie worries that her shoulder lump will prematurely age her

programme.title: Zero Stars
programme.desc: Many reviewers complain they travelled to Loch Ness and didn't see the monster. Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe try their best to find Nessie

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Second Prodigy and the Hottest Tips for Pouty Lips
programme.desc: The university tries to recruit another child prodigy, much to the displeasure of Sheldon, while Mary seeks June's advice when looking for a change

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The Coopers discuss the possibilities of black holes and alternate universes when Dr Sturgis comes over for dinner

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: At 700 pounds, Ontreon's faith in God kept him going, and he's training to become a minister. But if he can't believe in himself, he won't be able to stop eating

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Rebecca has had a tough time since her cancer diagnosis and going up 8 dress sizes. And, for Rula, gown shopping has been an ordeal. Can Al and Jo help?

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Bride Mandy's expectations are low thanks to bad shopping experiences. And, Rebecca worries about lack of cleavage, but Jo and Al have a few tricks to help.

programme.title: Secrets of a Door to Door Salesman (1973)
programme.desc: A young man gets a job as a vacuum salesman but finds that he has to fight off the advances of prospective female customers. Contains sex and nudity

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: Fisherman Darren heads into the North Sea from Staithes in search of lobster and crab. Shellfish are now a mainstay of the catch on the Yorkshire coast, with conservationists ensuring that the lobster population remains buoyant by breeding and releasing them from a purpose-built hatchery in Whitby. Plus, a new recruit joins the team running the historic tramway in Saltburn, and an ambitious couple launch the first wine grown in their Robin Hood's Bay vineyard

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The house holds a celebration of the centenary of the exhibition that discovered the tomb of Tutankhamen, led by the great-grandfather of the current Lord Carnarvon. Lady Carnarvon is writing a book about her husband's famous ancestor, while housekeepers Sheena and Jason are cleaning the Egyptian museum in the basement. Once the domain of the maids and footmen, it now houses replicas from the tomb of Tutankhamen and is a treasure trove that requires them to use special cleaning techniques

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: This edition charts the exploits of Pat and Sue Willan, who now retired plan to buy their very last floating home, which they hope to keep moored on the Thames. They have enlisted the help of a boat-maker in Stoke and opted for a 35-tonne, 55-foot state-of-the-art, all-mod-cons Dutch barge. They have a healthy budget of over £400,000 and elaborate plans for very contemporary kitchen fittings and gadgets and a powerful hydraulic engine

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave Wellman prepares to repair and replaster a bedroom ceiling in a family home

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave is in Worcestershire, widening access to a couple's property by building a concrete platform and new gateway

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: South African-born Linda, her husband Mark and Coco the cat share a one-bedroom floating home on Tagg's Island in Hampton, Surrey. It's an idyllic location, but their home is also their workplace and it's starting to feel a bit cramped. The couple want to stay put in their exclusive location, so Linda has hatched an ambitious plan to buy the boat next door and do it up all by herself. It's a huge challenge and it remains to be seen whether enthusiasm and passion will be enough to get the job done

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Carnarvon along with their staff turn the castle into a winter wonderland with their biggest-ever tree in the grand saloon and a festive cocktail masterclass hosted by butler Louis. Lady Carnarvon carves out some family time away from the public as she gathers loved ones around the tree for a festive get together

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: In Hornsea, new recruit Liam joins an independent lifeboat. Can he pass the gruelling tests that will enable him to save lives at sea? In Burton Constable, we discover the remains of an ocean giant washed up on the Holderness shoreline that appears in the literary classic Moby Dick. Glampsite owners Ed and Verity create a bespoke tent with glorious views of Whitby's gothic abbey

programme.title: Garden Rescue

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: In Uttoxeter, east Staffordshire, Shail and Cecilia long for a garden that reminds them of growing up in the countryside of India. However, the new-build garden they own is a featureless sloping plot. Lee Burkhill and Flo Headlam pool their efforts to create an entertainment space in the middle of the garden with a central patio featuring bespoke screesn and L-shaped benches. Lee adds a home-made tandoor for the family to cook together and a food prep area and vegetable growing beds. Flo mucks in with a planting area to draw attention from the giant walls and herb garden by the back door

programme.title: The World is Full of Married Men (1979)
programme.desc: Saucy, glossy romp adapted by Jackie Collins from her own novel _ and therefore a bit thin on plot, but bursting with heaving bosoms and heavy jewellery. It tells of an advertising executive's decidedly sordid extramarital escapades, and his neglected wife, who eventually gets tried of his philandering _ and decides to take her long-awaited revenge by giving him a well-deserved taste of his own medicine. Starring Anthony Franciosa, Gareth Hunt, Paul Nicholas, Carroll Baker and Georgina Hale.

programme.sub-title: Revisited: Shoreham on Sea, Powys and Stockport
programme.desc: Five years ago, the team turned Ian and Ruth's rural plot in Powys into a country garden in what was one of the series' most emotional reveals. programme.desc: A woman leaves her children in the backseat of her car in order to seek child support to buy diapers; her actions lead to a nasty fight with her ex.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: After seeing a resemblance to an ex-girlfriend's baby, a man takes a paternity test; the mother of his newfound child sues him for vandalism.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man videotapes his ex-fiancee allegedly slamming his computer in a car door as she drives away; she sues him for damages to her vehicle.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A verbal contract in the amount of $14,500 for a Harley ends badly when the barter portion of the deal gets lost in translation.

programme.title: Irish Crime Files: Body in the Canal
programme.desc: The story of a perplexing murder in Dublin, and how police work and a broad forensic investigation not only identified the victim, but ultimately led to the people responsible.

programme.title: Irish Crime Files: The Consummate Murder
programme.desc: The story of Irish woman Rachel O'Reilly in North Country Dublin, her murder, and the groundbreaking investigation that put her remorseless killer behind bars.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Double Murders
programme.desc: Simon Toyne revisits a case involving an apparent suicide plot that unearthed in the rural villages of County Derry, when the bodies of a man and woman are found.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Gangland Hit
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Superintendent Andy Tattersall to discover how Greater Manchester police solved the case of Andrew Green's murder.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: DNA Cold Case Solved
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre meets former Detective Chief Inspector Howard Groves to discover how he put John Sweeney behind bars for the murders of Melissa Halstead and Paula Fields.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Massacre at Red Gables Hotel
programme.desc: Dr. Nell Darby explores how former military commander Neil Rutherford unleashed terror on the guests of a remote Welsh seaside hotel in 1976, before turning the gun on himself.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's UK Killer Evidence
programme.desc: The story of a killer who thought he had got away with murder in Cambridgeshire; forensic advances lead to a breakthrough.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The story of how DNA identified 25-year-old Mary Schlais's killer in Minnesota, linking it to John Miller and showing how genetic genealogy brought long-awaited justice.

programme.title: Fatal Fall: Murder or Accident?
programme.desc: The case of Cody Johnson, who was pushed to his death almost 200 feet into a ravine at Glacier National Park, by his wife of only eight days, Jordan Graham.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn when the local lord is found strangled, so the cleric gets his walking boots on to solve the crime. Murder mystery, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A student backpacker is found dead in the showers of her hostel, and with a gun in her hand and her body slumped against the only door, all evidence points toward suicide. Humphrey isn't so sure, however, especially when he notices all her toiletries laid out and her towel missing. But when the team question the victim's boyfriend and her fellow backpackers, they find themselves with very little to go on. Meanwhile, JP prepares for the biggest day of his life as his wedding day approaches, and when Humphrey bumps into an old lady friend, Florence encourages her boss to pursue his quest for love

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After Jesse's close friend vanishes, Charlie and Rex discover the man was living two separate lives

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Constable Higgins goes undercover at a tow truck company embroiled in a deadly turf war

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Reporter Louise Cherry investigates a suspicious death of a man at a meat processing plant by going undercover as a sausage maker

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: A 'battle of the sexes' tennis match is disrupted when the woman playing is injured, and Chief Constable Brackenreid discovers that it was sabotage

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the House of Newsome
programme.desc: Rupert Newsome is accused of murdering his wife Lucinda, and despite his choice to represent himself in court, Effie tries her best to help

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn when the local lord is found strangled, so the cleric gets his walking boots on to solve the crime. Murder mystery, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A criminal profiler joins the team to help investigate a double murder case that bears resemblances to crimes committed a decade previously by a serial killer known as the Caveman. Jane clashes with the newcomer's scientific approach and disagrees with her theories about potential suspects - so he fabricates a piece of evidence to throw her off course in the hope of outwitting the real culprit. Crime drama, guest starring Linda Park (Raines)

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a magician dies during a practice-run of her latest routine, Charlie and Rex must look beyond the smoke and mirrors to uncover the truth

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A conversation with Walter Morgan at a formal event suggests to Carrie he holds key information about several murders, including that of her sister. The death of a tennis player reveals a link between the lawyer and the previous sniper calls, and when Morgan develops an unhealthy interest in Carrie, she must decide whether to form a friendship with him to solve the mystery of her sister's death

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A scientist studying a live volcano is found dead halfway up the mountain, and the evidence points to a heart attack. Humphrey is convinced one of the dead man's colleagues murdered him - an unlikely possibility, since they all have alibis. Away from the investigation, the inspector eagerly awaits Martha's return to the island, while JP settles into married life and Dwayne makes an error of judgment while talking to a journalist. Kris Marshall, Josephine Jobert and Danny John-Jules star in the sun-soaked whodunit, with guest appearances from Douglas Hodge, Natasha Little and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Ellen Mallam is left to drown in an upturned car by its driver, but the young woman's connection to James Blackstone, an aristocratic family's heir apparent, impedes Gently and Bacchus's investigation. The chief inspector discovers that the son's future has been carefully mapped out since birth by his implacable mother Alethea, and she will not countenance any interference in her plans. However, an astonishing twist causes the detectives to reconsider the case in its entirety. Sixties-set detective drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lee Ingleby, with Geraldine Somerville, James Norton, Roger Lloyd Pack, Christopher Fairbank and Ebony Buckle

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A former music hall comedian swears revenge on the priest, leaving Father Brown trapped in a derelict building. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Lady Felicia's reckless driving lands her in the next hospital bed to Mrs McCarthy - with a killer on the loose. Mystery, starring Nancy Carroll and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest investigates an apparent suicide, believing the death of a recently returned RAF pilot to be murder. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton

programme.title: Allegiance

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Jack Mooney has a fresh mystery to solve when zoo owner Xander Shepherd is killed by a tranquilliser dart in the middle of the grounds. With the park shut to the public at the time, suspicion falls on the victim's colleagues - but given they were all in the staff area when the shot was fired, how could any of them have done the deed? Meanwhile, Dwayne's replacement arrives in the shape of new officer Ruby Patterson - who also happens to be the Commissioner's niece - and Jack faces a mammoth task when he is signed up to the island's charity swim race

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon presents a special edition looking back over the best moments from the series. The celebrity panellists joining team captains Lee Mack and David Mitchell include Jo Brand, Daisy May Cooper, Stacey Dooley, Ronan Keating, Prue Leith, Scarlett Moffatt, Diane Morgan and Bob Mortimer

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests Nikki Fox, Miles Jupp, Nish Kumar and Joe Lycett to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig and Alan Davies are joined by Josh Widdicombe, Susan Calman and Matt Lucas for this extended edition of the long-running panel show - and this week it's a festive special, so Sandi's elves have been busy coming up with tough questions on the subject of - what else? - Noel. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers considered to be most interesting

programme.title: Frankie Boyle's New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the week's news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Leslie suspects her former best friend of being involved when a high fence is erected in Lafayette Park to keep Pawnee residents out of the more prosperous neighbouring town. Comedy, starring Amy Poehler, Aziz Ansari, Rashida Jones and Nick Offerman

programme.desc: Officers are suspicious when an elderly couple arrive from Mexico with five suitcases but no clothes, and a truck carrying garden furniture has something extra in the load
